name: input
title: BTInput
description: Material M3 outlined-style text input. Foundation of the btech input family.

files.content:
/**
 * Emoji dataset for BTInputRichEditor picker.
 * Each entry: [emoji, space-separated keywords (lowercase)]
 * Keywords drive the search filter.
 */

export interface EmojiCategory {
  id:     string;
  name:   string;
  icon:   string;            // representative emoji shown in the tab
  emojis: [string, string][]; // [char, keywords]
}
